prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-URAASATKFD-A Product Type: ROTARY_TOOL Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 100pc Universal Rotary Tool Abrasive Stone Precision Grinder Accessory Set Description: The Universal Rotary Tool Abrasive Precision Tip Accessory Set includes 100 assorted abrasive bits for detailed work on your home craft and hobby DIY project. The bits have 10 different shapes including Rods, Cones, Flat Wheels, Rounded tips all in a variety of grits from coarse to fine.

Ideal for just about all jobs that require precision; literally a unique bit for every job imaginable.

For use with marble, concrete, brick, porcelain, ceramics, epoxy, rock, glass, metal, tile, stone, and more. These bits will fit any standard rotary tool with a 1/8th shaft including all dremel models. Search Terms: rotary tool accessories gift for project diy dad handy man Features: - NO FANCY PACKAGING - This is a premium bulk buy with no hidden costs, no added claim shell packaging. Everything you need in a protective foam case. - JUST THE TIPS: (10) Different shaped abrasive grinder bits from coarse to fine grit with a 1/8 inch shaft for use with all rotary tool kits - Grits Vary From Fine to Coarse - 1/8 inch Shank | Universal Fit | All Standard Rotary Tools === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
